diagram_title: A0 — assembleBetas: produce anthropic-beta header value
purpose: Given (model, auth, provider, env) inputs, produce an ordered list of beta flag strings that is byte-equivalent to upstream claude-code v2.1.112 ZR1 output for the same inputs.
viewpoint: developer maintaining wire-fingerprint parity with claude-code

activities.title: Resolve model predicates
activities.description: Compute isHaiku, supports1MContext, supportsThinking, supportsContextManagement from modelId.

activities.title: Resolve env conditions
activities.description: Translate process.env reads into resolved booleans at the call site (provider.ts), then pass into assembleBetas as plain options.

activities.title: Apply per-flag conditional pushes in upstream order
activities.description: Walk the 9-step push ladder; each step independently consults its predicate(s) and pushes (or not).
mechanisms: assembleBetas() body — structurally arranged push ladder

activities.title: Append env-supplied flags
activities.description: Append items from envBetas[] verbatim to the end of the list. Skipped if empty.

activities.title: Deduplicate while preserving order
activities.description: Remove duplicates that arise from envBetas overlap. Order of first occurrence preserved.

to_spec.requirement: Requirement 4 (push order), Requirement 5 (MINIMUM_BETAS removed), Requirement 7 (reserved slots)
